title: cistanthe stricta
intro: Cistanthe stricta, also known as Purple Cistanthe or Star of the Andes, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Portulacaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and infection prevention. The health benefits of Cistanthe stricta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations and respiratory problems.
